framingZh: 构图跟着这个瞬间走，让同一个瞬间里的动作和现场先成立。
framingEn: close-up framing focused on the hand and plug, showing the moment of alignment or slight misalignment before connection
mustShowZh: 手握着充电线和插头，插头正对着或微微偏离插座孔
插座局部的阴影和纹理
动作中途停顿的瞬间，手指的轻微调整
mustShowEn: hand holding a phone charger and plug, plug oriented towards or slightly misaligned with a wall socket
texture and shadow of the wall socket area
the paused moment of adjustment, fingers slightly repositioning the plug
mayShowZh: 一小截充电线垂下的弧度
墙面或家具的普通局部作为背景
mayShowEn: a small arc of the charger cable hanging down
edge of a wrist or sleeve
ordinary section of wall or furniture as background
mustAvoidZh: 手机或插头的特写产品展示
干净无瑕的墙面或装饰性背景
动作已完成、插头已插好的状态
mustAvoidEn: product close-up of the phone or plug
facial expression as the primary focus
pristine, decorative, or blank wall backgrounds
the action already completed with plug fully inserted
atmosphereZh: 像顺手留下的一段真实生活
altTextZh: 璃音给手机充电，插头对准插孔的瞬间。
